name: The Wheel of Death
bootlegger: Players dying at night are randomly determined among living players on The Wheel of Death.
Zenomancer goals take your name off The Wheel of Death for a number of days rather than provide information.
As long as there is at least one name on the wheel of death, and a players death would end the game, they are removed from the wheel of death.
Legion voting rules always apply if there is an evil (non-strict) majority.
